description_long: This is a modern two-seater couch with a deep blue upholstered body and a sleek, rounded silhouette. The couch features two large seat cushions and a continuous, slightly curved backrest, both covered in smooth, solid-colored fabric. Two accent throw pillows, one in a light beige and the other in a mottled gray, are placed asymmetrically on the backrest, adding visual interest and comfort. The armrests are wide, rounded, and integrated into the overall form, providing a plush and inviting appearance. The base of the couch is supported by a low-profile wooden platform with short, angled legs, giving it a contemporary touch. The overall design is clean and minimal, suitable for urban interiors or stylish public spaces.
description: A modern blue two-seater couch with rounded arms, a continuous backrest, and two accent pillows, set on a wooden base with short angled legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two seat cushions, continuous backrest, and both accent pillows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rounded armrest and the depth of the seat, with both pillows visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted backrest and the wooden base, with the tops of the pillows peeking over.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite rounded armrest and the arrangement of the seat and pillows.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and a continuous back cushion, all integrated and non-tufted; two loose accent throw pillows placed asymmetrically.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a smooth, uniform texture; accent pillows have subtle mottled and textured patterns.
attribute_leg_style: Short, angled wooden legs partially visible beneath a low-profile wooden platform base.
attribute_armrest_design: Wide, rounded, and integrated armrests at each end, matching the couch's upholstery and height with the backrest.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest integrated with the frame, smooth and non-tufted, with no visible divisions.
